text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Diamond Stakes.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. You seem even more motivated than
usual today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I've been really fired up after setting
my New Year's goals!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Motivation—set! Mind and body—ready!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I see! Your drive is certainly palpable! Rest
assured, I'll make sure everyone else sees it too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser! I can't believe we ran into
you!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I've been your fan ever since the Kikuka Sho! I
can't wait to see you run today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: R-really?! Th-thank you!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
After your performance in your classic year, I
think a lot of people are excited to see more of
you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Y-you think so?!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text: Indeed... I myself am one of those fans.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Um... Do you happen to remember the time I
interviewed you at Tracen Academy?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Did you? Oh, you mean right after the Satsuki
Sho!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
That's right! What you said back then really saved
me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It did? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Well... Sorry to talk about myself, and I'm
embarrassed to say this, but I was at a dead end
at work.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't good at interviewing people, and my
articles were really mediocre. I was starting to
think I'd reached my limit...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
But then, I heard you confidently state that you
weren't special.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
You accepted that, yet you were still aiming for
the win... It really struck a chord with me.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: No, no, I didn't do anything, really...

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
I'd given up on myself, but when I saw how you
refused to accept defeat even while calling
yourself ordinary... I couldn't help but become
your fan.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I have hope again... You gave me
the push I needed to do my best.

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! I'm so sorry for springing that on you all of
a sudden!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: It's totally okay! In fact, I'm glad you told me!

text_block_list.name: Bespectacled Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Good luck in the race today! I'll be cheering you
on from the sidelines! Until we meet again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With his heavy bag in hand, the reporter in round
glasses bows his head and enters the racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: ...What a nice story.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...Mm. Now I really have to do my best today!
Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With support from many unexpected people,
Matikanetannhauser heads into the Diamond
Stakes.
